meta.notes: Data through 2026-05-01. Source: SIAM wholesale dispatches. File 1 (summary) covers 2012–2025-12-01 with segment + EV detail; File 2 (monthly SIAM) extends maker-level totals past that date. EV-vs-ICE and segment breakdowns are not available after 2025-12-01; maker values differ up to ~18% between the two sources at the seam (reported, File 1 not superseded).
